title: Cooking meal log cross-slice release QA
summary: F0와 #1~#13의 계정 세대, 검색·제품 연결, personal recipe/snapshot, cooking batch, meal log, planner와 legacy 계약을 exact repaired head의 verification-only final release gate로 묶는다.
goal: local/remote DB·API·browser·security·performance·design·rollback/legacy 증거와 current-head checks를 모두 blocker 0으로 닫되 defect는 별도 TDD repair PR과 full rerun으로만 처리한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for any stage
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, security-DB-operations reviewer, five-axis reviewer, design-authority-plan reviewer, Stage 2/3 verification, Stage 4 browser evidence, Stage 5 authority, Stage 6 and closeout; no self-approval

dependencies: account-session-generation-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1073
prepared-food-search-relevance Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1074
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076
recipe-visibility-read-hardening Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1077
recipe-snapshot-authority-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1078
personal-recipe-editor-decoupling Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1079
personal-recipe-customization-write-core Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1080
cooked-batch-weight-ledger Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1082
meal-log-core Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1083
planner-shell Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1084
cooked-batch-weight-ui Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1085
meal-log-ui Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1086
legacy-product-compat Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1087
Stage 2 plus runtime verification waits for F0 and #1 through #13 implementation closeout current-head green

external_smokes: application provider function and Auth Hook inventories local and remote
fresh local migrations replay RLS PostgREST Auth Storage and A-B isolation
account generation cutover quarantine cleanup image lifecycle and owner-signal-zero
search 287041 product link personal recipe propagation batch ledger and meal aggregate end-to-end
v1-v2 current-immediate-previous seeded drain rollback and legacy retention
real Chrome eight required screens at 390 320 desktop with fresh authority
independent security DB operations performance code Stage5 authority and Stage6 reviews
production staging provider mutations intentionally zero

verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of the exact-six Stage 1 artifacts
separate Codex security DB and operations review
separate Codex design-authority-plan review confirming verification-only reuse and fresh evidence
separate Codex Stage 3 security performance code reviews
separate Codex Stage 5 authority and Stage 6 closeout reviews

out_of_scope: Inline runtime repair or contract evolution inside the verification slice
New endpoint field status error enum migration UI composition or dependency
R+2 activation or strict v1 removal
Legacy product planner nutrition cursor image path or row tombstone
Legacy orphan enqueue delete or retention cleanup
Production staging provider writes without separate production-safe authority
Product MacBook launchd install or production secret provisioning before Manual Only approval
Physical-device actual-screen-reader and true-production-scale claims during Stage 1
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle remains planned. Approval stays not_started until separate Codex internal1.5, security-DB-operations, five-axis and design-authority-plan reviews reach zero findings. Stage 1 runs docs validators/tests/lint/typecheck/audit/diff; required_checks is the full-lifecycle gate and verify_commands is the current executable subset. Runtime verification waits for every F0 and #1 through #13 implementation/closeout current-head gate. The docs_refs entry for ui/designs/MEAL_LOG.md is a future #12-owned predecessor path reservation, not current evidence; its matching critique and authority artifacts must also be created and merged by #12 before #14 Stage 2 can start. Defects require a separate TDD repair PR and full rerun on the repaired exact head. No production/staging/provider write, destructive tombstone, legacy orphan deletion, R+2 activation or Manual Only installation is authorized.
